Off Calendar Nov-06-2007 Granted Per Written Order

For Waiver Of Appraisal By Probate Referee
Off Calendar Jul-09-2007 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-21-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Copeland (Petitioner in pro per).

The Court noted the issues concerning erroneous attestation to the will submitted for probate and the rememdy for the same to which Mr. Copeland assented. In sum: the erroneous attestation to the will filed for probate would be removed and returned to Mr. Copeland, and the correct attestation would be attached to and included with the will as if it had been filed with the will. The Court signed the Order for same in open court. That resolved, the Court granted the Petition for Probate, signing the Order for same in open court.

The Court then addressed the Petition for spousal property noting that the Order for same should not include the attachments submitted therewith. The Court granted that Petition subject to written Order (which Order was received this day, reviewed by the Court Examiner, and signed by the Court in chambers).

Judicial Officer: Commissioner Dorothy L. McMath; Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722; Court Investigator: None; Bailiff: Deputy Loos; Clerk: R. Michael Diles.

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Mar-21-2007 Granted Per Written Order
